title: WIMBY - Where Is My Block, Yo!
description: Ever Felt Like The Normal Spyglass Was Utterly Useless? Not anymore!, Display block data of all sorts all at once. Great for building over long distances at different heights!
body:
Ever Felt Like The Normal Spyglass Was Utterly Useless? Not anymore!, Display block data of all sorts all at once. Great for building over long distances at different heights!


Features:

When using the spyglass, Block pos and id are shown in the top left

Holding crouch will cause the "extended" info like emission, sky light, and block light (:

Goes through Entities to provide ONLY block data

Updates will progress so long as I remember to do so
